Around the dumpster/recycling area there are several Shagbark hickory trees. This is a State Park so it should be legal to collect for your own use. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
An abundance of autumn olives are available all over North Kettle Moraine State Forest. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-October.

There are many great locations where you can find morels at Mauthe Lake, but this is one of my favorite and most abundant. This whole hillside has a lot of them. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: May-June.
Down this road there are many spots where morels grow. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: May-June.
